attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
EXQHG.REQUEST_ID,
EXQHG.GUIDANCE_ID,
EXQHG.DEAL_OBJECT_ID,
EXQHG.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID,
EXQHG.IS_FINAL,
EXQHG.IN_SALES_DASHBOARD,
EXQHG.GUIDANCE_LEVEL,
EXQHG.REQUESTED_DISCOUNT,
EXQHG.GUIDANCE_DISCOUNT,
EXQHG.DISCOUNT_DISCRETION,
EXQHG.REQUESTED_BY,
EXQHG.REQUESTED_ON,
EXQHG.UPDATED_BY,
EXQHG.UPDATED_ON,
/****Added below columns as part of EPS HANA DATA FOUNDATION project****/
EXQHG.STATUS,
EXQHG.APPROVER_ROLE,
EXQHG.BAND,
EXQHG.BOOKINGS_UPSIDE,
EXQHG.RECOMMENDATION,
EXQHG.BOOKINGS_UPSIDE_PCT,
EXQHG.BAROMETER_NEEDLE
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_XXSDG_QUOTE_HDR_GUIDANCE_V EXQHG WHERE EXQHG.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI' 
AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXSDG_QUOTE_HDR_GUIDANCE_V SXQHG WHERE SXQHG.REQUEST_ID=EXQHG.REQUEST_ID)

SELECT
SXQHG.REQUEST_ID,
SXQHG.GUIDANCE_ID,
SXQHG.DEAL_OBJECT_ID,
SXQHG.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID,
SXQHG.IS_FINAL,
SXQHG.IN_SALES_DASHBOARD,
SXQHG.GUIDANCE_LEVEL,
SXQHG.REQUESTED_DISCOUNT,
SXQHG.GUIDANCE_DISCOUNT,
SXQHG.DISCOUNT_DISCRETION,
SXQHG.REQUESTED_BY,
SXQHG.REQUESTED_ON,
SXQHG.UPDATED_BY,
SXQHG.UPDATED_ON,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
/**Added below columns as part of EPS HANA FOUNDATION***/
SXQHG.STATUS,
SXQHG.APPROVER_ROLE,
SXQHG.BAND,
SXQHG.BOOKINGS_UPSIDE,
SXQHG.RECOMMENDATION,
SXQHG.BOOKINGS_UPSIDE_PCT,
SXQHG.BAROMETER_NEEDLE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXSDG_QUOTE_HDR_GUIDANCE_V SXQHG WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE NDQ
	WHERE SXQHG.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID=NDQ.SK_QUOTE_OBJECT_ID_INT 
	AND NDQ.SS_CODE <> 'CCWR')

SELECT
DQ.BK_QUOTE_NUM AS BK_QUOTE_NUM,
COALESCE(QHG.GUIDANCE_ID,-999) AS BK_GUIDANCE_ID_INT,
QHG.REQUESTED_BY AS RU_REQUESTED_BY_USER_ID,
COALESCE(QHG.IS_FINAL,'N') AS IS_FINALIZED_FLG,
COALESCE(QHG.IN_SALES_DASHBOARD,'N') AS IN_SALES_DASHBOARD_FLG,
QHG.REQUESTED_ON AS REQUESTED_ON_DT,
'=' AS REQUSTED_BY_USER_ROLE,
COALESCE(QHG.REQUEST_ID,999) AS SK_REQUEST_ID_INT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE
FROM (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXSDG_QUOTE_HDR_GUIDANCE_V
				QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY GUIDANCE_ID, QUOTE_OBJECT_ID ORDER BY UPDATED_ON DESC)=1) QHG
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE DQ
ON QHG.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID = DQ.SK_QUOTE_OBJECT_ID_INT
AND DQ.SS_CODE <> 'CCWR'
